prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-LIPBALM2PK-MICKEY-AMZ Product Type: LIP_BALM Brand (from catalog): Disney Existing Title: Disney Mickey and Minnie Lip Balm Bundle with 4 Lip Balms in Assorted Flavors - Bonus 1 Assorted Dis Description: The Mickey Mouse 2pc flavored lip balm set with Mickey’s ear-shaped caps will give your little one the most perfect lip protection when on their own extraordinary adventures. Featuring everyone’s favorite Disney mouse, the multiple-piece set includes fun lip balm flavors: Cheerful Cherry and Bubblegum.

Whether at a sleepover slumber party, sporting event, school, or a fun play date, your little one’s lips will stay hydrated and avoid painful chapping and dryness with the proper use of this lip balm. The water-based, nontoxic formula is safe for children with adult supervision, and will keep their lips hydrated regardless of the season.

Disney Mickey Mouse lip balm is a great birthday, Christmas, or stocking stuffer gift for the little Disney fan in your life. Search Terms: girls lip balm kids lip treatment set nontoxic lip balm for children mickey mouse stocking stuffer disney party favor for girls 3 and up toddler dress up gifts pretend play sets for girls bff sister gift mickey mouse holiday gift girls makeup Features: - MICKEY MOUSE LIP BALM - Officially licensed Disney lip balm set features Mickey Mouse; Each lip balm is adorned with unique Mickey ear-shaped cap for a fun look - KEEP LIPS HYDRATED - Perfect for children, flavored lip balms are safe for kids ages 3 and up and assist with keeping lips hydrated; Great option for traveling and use in all seasons - FUN KIDS MAKEUP - Ideal for dress up, pretend play, and sleepovers, kids will love showing off their very own makeup just like Mom!; 2 flavors included: Cheerful Cherry & Bubblegum - EASY CLEAN UP - Water-based, nontoxic formula is safe and effective for kids; Can be easily removed with soap and water if needed - SPECIFICATIONS - Lip balm tubes: .14oz; Recommended age: 3+ years; Avoid eye contact; Do not ingest; Formula: nontoxic, water-based (easy to clean); 2 flavors: cheerful cherry, bubble gum === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Disney Mickey Mouse 2-Pack Lip Balm Set

openai.item_name: Disney 2-Pk Mickey Mouse Lip Balm Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: Mickey Ear-Shaped Caps, 2 Flavors, Nontoxic Water-Based, Ages 3 And Up, Hydrating

openai.title_differentiation: Cheerful Cherry And Bubblegum Flavors, Ear Shaped Caps, Water Based Nontoxic Formula, Ages 3, Travel Friendly
